title: Scarcheek
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
'''Scarcheek''' and [[Longnose]] were the nicknames given by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] to the two hit-[[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] who tried to kill her on [[Tenupe]]. Jaina chose to spare their lives, but warned that that anymore attempts on her life and they would become speeder-kill.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
